state.context_pack_title: T-186: Add command timing and edit summaries to reports

session_preflight.message: No active owner or patcher session lease with branch and worktree metadata covers this implementation task.
session_preflight.agent_guidance: Claim or create a branch/worktree session before mutating code, or record an explicit host-worktree session when sharing this checkout is intentional.

output_excerpt: Implemented complete-window summary coverage deltas for report_summary_timing_window_impact. JSON now exposes summary_complete_window_share_delta, summary_complete_window_duration_share_delta, and summary_complete_window_coverage_label for command, edit, and activity buckets. Markdown renders the new deltas and labels in the compact report_summary_timing_window_impact line. Regression evidence covers command recorded-summary-higher complete-window coverage, edit balanced complete-window coverage, and activity recorded-summary-higher coverage, plus fixture regeneration. Verification passed: focused timing-window pytest, focused rich Markdown fixture pytest, and bash scripts/ci_check.sh (46 passed, 1 warning; wrote examples/trace-example.json).

code_review.summary: Reviewed complete-window coverage delta implementation. Scope stayed within AgentSpec allowed paths. JSON metrics compute count-share and duration-share deltas from existing complete-window shares, label recorded-summary-higher/balanced/missing-summary-higher coverage, Markdown renders the new fields, tests assert command/edit/activity values, and rich fixture/docs/handoff are aligned. Verification passed with focused report pytest, focused fixture pytest, and bash scripts/ci_check.sh (46 passed, 1 warning).
